statLook.label: Stat display look
statLook.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for stat / KPI cards.

metrics.label: Metrics
metrics.description: One stat card per entry; declares aggregation, format, and styling
metrics.synonyms: list of KPI cards / stat tiles / metric cards. each entry has label / value / format / icon / variant / aggregation. user phrases: 'replace metrics with X, Y, Z' -> rewrite array; 'add Revenue tile' -> append entry; 'change KPIs to X' -> rewrite array

title.label: Section title
title.description: Heading shown above the stat-card grid
title.synonyms: the section header text. user phrases: 'rename section to X' / 'title the KPIs X' / 'change section title to X' -> X

children.className: text-7xl md:text-8xl font-bold tracking-tighter tabular-nums text-[var(--color-foreground)]
relative z-10 w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto text-center
absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 w-full opacity-10 pointer-events-none

bodyContent.label: Body content tree
bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after metrics aggregate. Default is the canonical data-grid call mapping @entity.cards through stat-display. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (hero numbers, sparkline rows, tile splashes) to deliver entirely different KPI UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, aggregation pipeline, and listens.

viewPattern.label: Render pattern
viewPattern.description: UI pattern used to arrange the stat cards
viewPattern.synonyms: internal pattern selector. user prompts rarely target this directly

fields.name: cards
fields.description: A collection of statistical cards to display.
